name: arb-policies-skillset
description: Pull-mode pipeline for arb-policies: crack + chunk via Content Understanding, categorize each chunk via Azure OpenAI chat completion, embed via Azure OpenAI embeddings. Output is projected into the existing arb-policies index, one chunk per document.

skills.name: crack-and-chunk
skills.description: Content Understanding — document cracking, semantic chunking, and Markdown extraction.

skills.name: categorize-chunk
skills.description: Assign each chunk a canonical PolicyCategory. Prompt is rendered from agents.categories.CATEGORIZE_SYSTEM_PROMPT; the build_indexer.py script substitutes the prompt at deploy time so the on-the-wire skillset stays byte-stable.

skills.name: embed-chunk
skills.description: Vectorize each chunk via the Foundry embeddings deployment. dimensions=1536 must match the existing index schema.

cognitiveServices.description: Billing target for Content Understanding (CU) and chat-completion skills. Defaults to FOUNDRY_ENDPOINT (foundry-cc-canada). If CU is not supported in your Foundry region, set FOUNDRY_CU_ENDPOINT to an AI Services account in a CU-supported region (Sweden Central, East US 2, West US 3).
